{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Visirian Sky Knights
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Visirian Sky Knights]] are known for their impressive combat action.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18">''The Captain'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
